policies.reason: Pilot Level 3a policy so the text_syndicate content chain no longer needs a manual set_execution_approval.py call for every doc_creation task.

Extends text_syndicate's pre-approval coverage to market_research, matching kabukicho_survival_map's full-chain policy, so the continuous content pipeline (market_research -> marketing -> doc_creation) can run without a manual set_execution_approval.py call at any hop.

Extends text_syndicate's pre-approval coverage to marketing, matching kabukicho_survival_map's full-chain policy, so the continuous content pipeline (market_research -> marketing -> doc_creation) can run without a manual set_execution_approval.py call at any hop.

Raised from 3 to 10/day per the operator's explicit, formal request (2026-07-11) to support several category-focused deep-dive research tasks in one pass -- the initial 12-POI dataset across 6 categories was too sparse to be useful (target: ~100+ total).
Pilot Level 3a policy so kabukicho_survival_map's marketing tasks (the next_roles hop from market_research) no longer need a manual set_execution_approval.py call each time.
Pilot Level 3a policy so kabukicho_survival_map's doc_creation tasks (the next_roles hop from marketing) no longer need a manual set_execution_approval.py call each time.

Covers scenario_writing (tag-based evaluation copy and unofficial/gray-zone disclaimer text per issue #33's spec) with the same no-manual-approval treatment as the rest of kabukicho_survival_map's chain.
